meaning: adj.象冬季的,寒冷的,冬天的,冷淡的
examples: There were gardens and paths and big trees, but everything looked dull and wintry.
It felt wintry cold that day.
Wintry weather continues to sweep across Colorado.
It felt good to be out in the weather, that wintry sting of approaching snow.
Wintry conditions also forced their game in Minneapolis on Sunday to be rescheduled for Aug. 19.
